imports 

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
import warnings
from IPython.display import HTML

from pandas_datareader import data as pdr

def show(fig): 
    return HTML(fig.to_html(include_plotlyjs='cdn', include_mathjax=False))

theme 

import mplcyberpunk
plt.style.use("seaborn-dark")
#plt.style.use("cyberpunk")
matplotlib.pyplot.xkcd(scale=0, length=200)

line

예제1 (matplotlib) 

symbols = ['AMZN','AAPL', 'GOOG', 'FB', 'MSFT', 'NFLX', 'NVDA','TSLA']
start = '2020-01-01'
end = '2021-11-25'
df = pdr.get_data_yahoo(symbols, start, end)['Adj Close']
df

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

RemoteDataError: No data fetched using 'YahooDailyReader'
df.reset_index()

df.stack().reset_index().rename(columns={0:'value'})

df.plot.line(y='AMZN')

df.plot.line(y=['AMZN','TSLA'])

df.plot.line()

df.plot.line(figsize=(12,10))

df.plot.line(figsize=(6,12),subplots=True)

df.plot.line(figsize=(15,6),subplots=True,layout=(2,4))

df.plot.line(figsize=(15,6),subplots=True,layout=(2,4),fontsize=10)

df.plot.line(figsize=(15,6),subplots=True,layout=(2,4),fontsize=10,alpha=0.5)

df.plot.line(figsize=(15,6),subplots=True,layout=(2,4),legend=False)

bar, barh

예제1 (matplotlib) 

df = pd.read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kalilurrahman/datasets/main/mobilephonemktshare2020.csv') 
df
Date Samsung Apple Huawei Xiaomi Oppo Mobicel Motorola LG Others Realme Google Nokia Lenovo OnePlus Sony Asus
0 2019-10 31.49 22.09 10.02 7.79 4.10 3.15 2.41 2.40 9.51 0.54 2.35 0.95 0.96 0.70 0.84 0.74
1 2019-11 31.36 22.90 10.18 8.16 4.42 3.41 2.40 2.40 9.10 0.78 0.66 0.97 0.97 0.73 0.83 0.75
2 2019-12 31.37 24.79 9.95 7.73 4.23 3.19 2.50 2.54 8.13 0.84 0.75 0.90 0.87 0.74 0.77 0.70
3 2020-01 31.29 24.76 10.61 8.10 4.25 3.02 2.42 2.40 7.55 0.88 0.69 0.88 0.86 0.79 0.80 0.69

10 2020-08 31.04 25.15 10.73 8.90 4.69 3.38 2.39 1.96 6.31 1.18 0.63 0.74 0.72 0.75 0.73 0.70
11 2020-09 30.57 24.98 10.58 9.49 4.94 3.50 2.27 1.88 6.12 1.45 0.63 0.74 0.67 0.81 0.69 0.67
12 2020-10 30.25 26.53 10.44 9.67 4.83 2.54 2.21 1.79 6.04 1.55 0.63 0.69 0.65 0.85 0.67 0.64 
df.plot.bar(x='Date', y=['Samsung','Apple'],figsize=(10,5))

<AxesSubplot:xlabel='Date'>
df.plot.bar(x='Date', y=['Samsung','Apple'],figsize=(10,5),width=0.7)

<AxesSubplot:xlabel='Date'>
df.plot.barh(x='Date', y=['Samsung','Apple'],figsize=(5,10),width=0.7)

<AxesSubplot:ylabel='Date'>
df.plot.bar(x='Date',figsize=(30,20),subplots=True,layout=(4,4),legend=False)

array([[<AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Samsung'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Apple'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Huawei'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Xiaomi'}, xlabel='Date'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Oppo'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Mobicel'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Motorola'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'LG'}, xlabel='Date'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Others'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Realme'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Google'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Nokia'}, xlabel='Date'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Lenovo'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'OnePlus'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Sony'}, xlabel='Date'>,
        <AxesSubplot:title={'center':'Asus'}, xlabel='Date'>]],
      dtype=object)
  • 이건 사실 라인플랏으로 그리는게 더 좋음 
df.melt(id_vars='Date').groupby('variable').agg(np.mean).plot.bar()

<AxesSubplot:xlabel='variable'>
df.melt(id_vars='Date').groupby('variable').agg(np.mean).sort_values('value',ascending=False).plot.bar()

<AxesSubplot:xlabel='variable'>

예제1 (plotly) 

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').groupby('variable').agg(np.mean).sort_values('value',ascending=False).plot.bar(backend='plotly')
show(fig)

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').plot.bar(x='Date',y='value',color='variable',backend='plotly')
show(fig)

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').query('variable=="Samsung" or variable=="Apple" or variable=="Huawei" or variable=="Xiaomi"').\
plot.bar(x='Date',y='value',color='variable',barmode='group',backend='plotly')
show(fig)

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').query('variable=="Samsung" or variable=="Apple" or variable=="Huawei" or variable=="Xiaomi"').\
plot.bar(x='Date',y='value',color='variable',barmode='group',backend='plotly',text='value')
show(fig)

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').query('variable=="Samsung" or variable=="Apple" or variable=="Huawei" or variable=="Xiaomi"').\
plot.bar(x='Date',y='value',color='variable',facet_col='variable',backend='plotly')
show(fig)

fig = df.melt(id_vars='Date').query('variable=="Samsung" or variable=="Apple" or variable=="Huawei" or variable=="Xiaomi"').\
plot.bar(x='value',y='Date',color='variable',facet_row='variable',backend='plotly',height=700)
show(fig)

pie

df = pd.read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kalilurrahman/datasets/main/mobilephonemktshare2020.csv') 
df

df.set_index('Date').loc[:,['Samsung','Apple','Huawei','Xiaomi']].plot.pie(subplots=True,layout=(2,2),legend=False,figsize=(10,10))

array([[<AxesSubplot:ylabel='Samsung'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='Apple'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:ylabel='Huawei'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='Xiaomi'>]],
      dtype=object)
df.set_index('Date').stack().swaplevel().unstack().plot.pie(subplots=True,figsize=(30,30),layout=(4,4),legend=False)

array([[<AxesSubplot:ylabel='2019-10'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2019-11'>,
        <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2019-12'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-01'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-02'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-03'>,
        <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-04'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-05'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-06'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-07'>,
        <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-08'>, <AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-09'>],
       [<AxesSubplot:ylabel='2020-10'>, <AxesSubplot:>, <AxesSubplot:>,
        <AxesSubplot:>]], dtype=object)
df.melt(id_vars='Date').groupby('variable').agg(np.mean).sort_values('value',ascending=False).plot.pie(y='value',legend=False,figsize=(5,5))

<AxesSubplot:ylabel='value'>

df.set_index('Date').pct_change().dropna().plot.box(figsize=(20,5))

<AxesSubplot:>

예제1 (plotly) 

fig = df.set_index('Date').pct_change().dropna().plot.box(backend='plotly')
show(fig)

df.set_index('Date').pct_change().dropna().melt()
variable value
0 Samsung -0.004128
1 Samsung 0.000319
2 Samsung -0.002550
3 Samsung -0.012144
4 Samsung -0.003559
... ... ...
187 Asus -0.013158
188 Asus -0.040000
189 Asus -0.027778
190 Asus -0.042857
191 Asus -0.044776

192 rows × 2 columns

fig = df.set_index('Date').pct_change().dropna().melt().plot.box(x='variable',y='value',color='variable',backend='plotly')
show(fig)

ValueError: 'variable' is not a valid value for color
  • matplotlib으로는 그리기 힘듬

예제2 (plotly) 

import plotly.express as px
df = px.data.tips()
df
total_bill tip sex smoker day time size
0 16.99 1.01 Female No Sun Dinner 2
1 10.34 1.66 Male No Sun Dinner 3
2 21.01 3.50 Male No Sun Dinner 3
3 23.68 3.31 Male No Sun Dinner 2
4 24.59 3.61 Female No Sun Dinner 4
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
239 29.03 5.92 Male No Sat Dinner 3
240 27.18 2.00 Female Yes Sat Dinner 2
241 22.67 2.00 Male Yes Sat Dinner 2
242 17.82 1.75 Male No Sat Dinner 2
243 18.78 3.00 Female No Thur Dinner 2

244 rows × 7 columns

fig = df.plot.box(y='total_bill',backend='plotly',height=500,width=500)
show(fig)

fig = df.plot.box(x='time',y='total_bill',backend='plotly',height=500,width=500)
show(fig)

fig = df.plot.box(x='time',y='total_bill',color='sex',backend='plotly',height=500,width=500)
show(fig)

fig = df.plot.box(x='time',y='total_bill',color='sex',backend='plotly',height=500,width=500,points='all')
show(fig)

fig = df.plot.box(x='time',y='total_bill',color='sex',backend='plotly',height=500,width=1000,points='all',facet_col='day',facet_row='smoker')
show(fig)

- tidydata의 위력: 위와 같은 자료를 matplotlib backend 로는 거의 불가능함

df.plot.box(y='total_bill')

<AxesSubplot:>

- df.plot.box(x='time',y='total_bill',backend='plotly',height=500,width=500) 와 같은 그림은 그릴 수 없다. (wide form으로 나타낼 수 없기 때문)

hist, kde, density

예제1 (matplotlib) 

_arr = [3,4,5,6,7,8,9,10]

df=pd.DataFrame([(np.random.normal(size=(1000,_arr[i]),loc=0,scale=1)**2).sum(axis=1) for i in range(len(_arr))]).T
df
0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
0 3.897363 3.574313 2.268250 5.955647 3.177063 5.635757 10.642911 12.866395
1 2.202175 5.994385 5.752781 10.298092 11.844822 3.745722 15.838187 11.560772
2 3.000330 6.000131 4.024129 2.704761 4.622731 6.753119 1.608168 3.282518
3 1.712913 5.422747 4.850017 1.096502 13.737637 3.543373 3.825437 10.969502
4 0.943856 3.925641 8.749842 1.500229 5.349473 7.840731 5.779171 5.035525
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
995 0.936374 1.466733 7.423889 3.693078 5.006517 11.079028 16.281217 3.157571
996 0.564328 0.025835 6.396514 3.084319 4.931184 8.651372 11.022631 23.252423
997 0.413869 3.373399 7.804409 9.738337 7.052249 10.642445 13.166542 5.781390
998 1.218988 2.906232 4.609620 6.345172 11.757267 7.021932 6.882119 6.428229
999 3.034969 2.841131 3.608046 10.075954 4.128531 12.543731 6.838991 9.131170

1000 rows × 8 columns

df.columns = _arr

df.plot.hist()

<AxesSubplot:ylabel='Frequency'>
df.plot.hist(bins=50,alpha=0.2)

<AxesSubplot:ylabel='Frequency'>
df.plot.hist(bins=50,subplots=True,layout=(2,4),figsize=(12,5),alpha=0.5)
plt.tight_layout()

df.plot.kde(subplots=True,layout=(2,4),figsize=(12,5))
plt.tight_layout()

df.plot.kde(subplots=True,layout=(2,4),bw_method=0.05,figsize=(12,5))
plt.tight_layout()

df.plot.kde(subplots=True,bw_method=5,layout=(2,4),figsize=(12,5))
plt.tight_layout()

df.plot.density(subplots=True,bw_method=2,layout=(2,4),figsize=(12,5),ls='--')
plt.tight_layout()

fig = df.plot.hist(x='total_bill',backend='plotly',facet_row='sex',facet_col='time',color='sex',width=1000,height=600)

area

df.iloc[1:].set_index(('행정구역별','행정구역별')).stack().reset_index().query("level_1 == '비율'").set_index(('행정구역별','행정구역별')).iloc[:,1:].T.\
applymap(lambda x: float(x) if x!='-' else None)
(행정구역별, 행정구역별) 서울특별시 부산광역시 대구광역시 인천광역시 광주광역시 대전광역시 울산광역시 세종특별자치시 경기도 강원도 충청북도 충청남도 전라북도 전라남도 경상북도 경상남도 제주특별자치도

df.iloc[1:].set_index(('행정구역별','행정구역별')).stack().reset_index().query("level_1 == '비율'").set_index(('행정구역별','행정구역별')).iloc[:,1:].T.\
applymap(lambda x: float(x) if x!='-' else None).\
